text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One key task is text understanding, where a computer reads a sentence and extracts its meaning. This technology also powers translation tools, allowing people to communicate across different languages. Another important application is sentiment analysis, which identifies whether a piece of text expresses a positive, negative, or neutral feeling. Finally, NLP is the core technology behind chatbots, enabling them to understand our questions and provide helpful responses in real time.
